name: File Processing State Machine
rules: 5 states: INPUT -> STABILIZING -> PROCESSING -> VALIDATING -> SUCCESS | FAILURE
Only BarcodeBuddyService in app/processor.py transitions file state
File state transitions happen via atomic OS-level rename (shutil.move)
Journal files in processing/.journal track in-flight state - never delete mid-processing
Rejected files get a .meta.json sidecar with rejection context - never discard silently
Recovery on startup: stranded files in processing/ are re-enqueued to input/
FAILURE is terminal: file moves to rejected_path with error_code from contracts.py
SUCCESS is terminal: PDF written to output_path/YYYY/MM with barcode-based filename
Never move files directly between directories outside the service class
